account_kind.description: Specifies the kind of storage account, such as Storage or StorageV2.

account_replication_type.description: Defines the replication strategy for the storage account, like LRS or GRS.

account_tier.description: Specifies the performance tier of the storage account, either Standard or Premium.

allow_nested_items_to_be_public.description: Allows nested items within the storage account to be publicly accessible.

allowed_copy_scope.description: Defines the scope allowed for copying data, such as Private or AAD.

cross_tenant_replication_enabled.description: Enables replication of data across different Azure tenants.

default_to_oauth_authentication.description: Sets OAuth as the default authentication method.

dns_endpoint_type.description: Specifies the type of DNS endpoint, such as Standard or AzureDnsZone.

edge_zone.description: Specifies the Azure Edge Zone where the storage account is deployed.

infrastructure_encryption_enabled.description: Enables additional encryption for data at rest.

is_hns_enabled.description: Enables the hierarchical namespace for the storage account.

local_user_enabled.description: Allows local users to access the storage account.

min_tls_version.description: Specifies the minimum TLS version required for requests to the storage account.

name.description: The name of the storage account.

nfsv3_enabled.description: Enables NFSv3 protocol support for the storage account.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Allows access to the storage account from public networks.

queue_encryption_key_type.description: Specifies the type of encryption key used for queues.

sftp_enabled.description: Enables SFTP support for the storage account.

shared_access_key_enabled.description: Allows the use of shared access keys for authentication.

table_encryption_key_type.description: Specifies the type of encryption key used for tables.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the storage account.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
